<!-- Design language DL-03 LOGOS token block -->

## Design language: LOGOS (DL-03)

**Evidence before opinion.** Ancient Greece: Logic and evidence.

Status: adopted. Occasions: deep-dive analysis, monthly chartbooks, advisory notes.

### Design laws

- Every chart proves one claim
- Annotation over legends
- Sources always visible
- Titles make arguments
- Decoration never competes with evidence

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | evidence-first |
| density | scientific |
| annotation_policy | guided |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | session |
| charts_per_page | 3 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FDF4EA` |
| ink | `#262A33` |
| body | `#4A4E57` |
| hairline | `#E8E0D4` |
| gridline | `#E8E0D4` |
| primary | `#9E2B25` |
| muted | `#B8B2A7` |
| positive | `#2E6E4E` |
| negative | `#9E2B25` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Oswald','Arial Narrow',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: true, eyebrow: true
